title: deduplicate identical build_client in NoneAuth/BearerAuth/BasicAuth
description: NoneAuth, BearerAuth, and BasicAuth all have identical build_client bodies: reqwest::ClientBuilder::new().connect_timeout(10s).build(). Changing any shared setting (e.g. adding a user-agent, adjusting timeout) requires updating three identical blocks. Extract a private module-level fn default_client() -> Result<reqwest::Client, ClientError> { Ok(reqwest::ClientBuilder::new().connect_timeout(Duration::from_secs(10)).build()?) } and call it from the three implementations. CustomCaAuth keeps its own because it adds a root certificate.
